message: fix: unblock CI minimatch audit and host policy check

files.patch:
@@ -22,17 +22,17 @@ enum HostEnvSecurityPolicy {
         "PS4",
         "GCONV_PATH",
         "IFS",
-        "SSLKEYLOGFILE",
+        "SSLKEYLOGFILE"
     ]
 
     static let blockedOverrideKeys: Set<String> = [
         "HOME",
-        "ZDOTDIR",
+        "ZDOTDIR"
     ]
 
     static let blockedPrefixes: [String] = [
         "DYLD_",
         "LD_",
-        "BASH_FUNC_",
+        "BASH_FUNC_"
     ]
 }

@@ -6,11 +6,11 @@ settings:
 
 overrides:
   hono: 4.11.10
+  fast-xml-parser: 5.3.6
   request: npm:@cypress/request@3.0.10
   request-promise: npm:@cypress/request-promise@5.0.0
-  fast-xml-parser: 5.3.6
   form-data: 2.5.4
-  minimatch: 10.2.1
+  minimatch: 10.2.4
   qs: 6.14.2
   '@sinclair/typebox': 0.34.48
   tar: 7.5.9

+    engines: {node: 18 || 20 || >=22}
